description: Reference to the environment a run will execute in. Mirrors the shape used by `EnvironmentsManager` (`SandboxEnvironment`) but without the heavy detail snapshot — the recipe only needs the identity + status to render summary chrome.

ephemeral.description: Whether this environment is a freshly cloned ephemeral sandbox or a saved long-lived environment.

status.description: Mirror of `SandboxRuntimeStatus` strings ("started", "stopped", …). Kept loose so callers don't need to import the environments package.

title: BacktestEnvironmentRef
